plugins.name: highimpact-frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Mood-based font selection from 1,500+ Google Fonts, staged build pipeline, live browser testing, and design review — all orchestrated to avoid generic AI aesthetics.
